creator: damjan.jov@gmail.com
text:
Prelink is now in ports (http://www.freshports.org/sysutils/prelink/),
but discussion is ongoing in the freebsd-emulation mailing list about
whether it should be used to compile Wine (as apposed to the
-Ttext-segment option in new version of ld). There are also a few rtld
patches floating around on that list thread that are necessary.
